productDisplayName: Lotto Men Classica II White Sports Shoes
description: The lotto Stadio Classica II Turf football boots are one of the latest models from lotto, designed for those who are looking for a heritage look but with plenty of technology.UpperSupple full grain leather upperReinforced suede toe capPerforated upper for ventilationLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fitCushioned footbed for shock absorptionMidsoleEVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the outsole for added traction and absolute gripThe outsoles are stiched to the upper to increase the longevity of the footwearshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
